title: Financial Data Security
description: Learn to protect sensitive financial and regulated business data.

scenarios.title: Revenue Data in Summary Request
scenarios.description: You need AI to summarize quarterly results. Which approach is safe?
scenarios.unsafe_example: Summarize: Q3 revenue was $4.2B with 18.3% gross margin. EBITDA grew 12% YoY to $1.8B.
scenarios.safe_example: Help me create a template for summarizing quarterly financial results with sections for revenue, margins, and growth metrics.
scenarios.explanation: Never share exact financial figures. Ask for templates or use approximate/fictional numbers.

quiz.question: Which of the following is safe to include in an AI prompt?
options: A request for a financial report template
quiz.correct_answer: A request for a financial report template
quiz.explanation: Asking for templates is safe. Sharing exact financial data or unreleased figures is not.
